trans-unit.source: Access string has invalid syntax.
trans-unit.target: La cadena de acceso tiene una sintaxis no válida.

trans-unit.source: The expected collection contains {1} occurrence(s) of <{2}>. The actual collection contains {3} occurrence(s). {0}
trans-unit.target: Apariciones que contiene la colección esperada: {1} de <{2}>. Apariciones que contiene la colección real: {3}. {0}

trans-unit.source: Duplicate item found:<{1}>. {0}
trans-unit.target: Se encontró un elemento duplicado:<{1}>. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected all items in collection to be distinct.
trans-unit.target: Expected all items in collection to be distinct.

trans-unit.source: Expected all items in collection to be non-null.
trans-unit.target: Expected all items in collection to be non-null.

trans-unit.source: Expected all items in collection to be of the specified type.
trans-unit.target: Expected all items in collection to be of the specified type.

trans-unit.source: Expected:<{1}>. Actual:<{2}>. {0}
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba <{1}>, pero es <{2}>. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected a difference no greater than <{3}> between expected value <{1}> and actual value <{2}>. {0}
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba una diferencia no superior a <{3}> entre el valor esperado <{1}> y el valor actual <{2}>. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected:<{1}>. Case is different for actual value:<{2}>. {0}
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba:<{1}>. La caja es diferente para el valor actual:<{2}>. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected:
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba:

trans-unit.source: But was:
trans-unit.target: Pero fue:

trans-unit.source: String lengths are both {0} but differ at index {1}.
trans-unit.target: Las longitudes de las cadenas son {0} pero difieren en el índice {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected string length {0} but was {1}.
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba una longitud de cadena {0} pero fue {1}.

trans-unit.source: Expected values to be structurally equivalent.
trans-unit.target: Expected values to be structurally equivalent.

trans-unit.source: Expected values to be structurally equivalent (strict mode).
trans-unit.target: Expected values to be structurally equivalent (strict mode).

trans-unit.source: reading the actual dictionary threw {0}: {1}.
trans-unit.target: reading the actual dictionary threw {0}: {1}.

trans-unit.source: enumerating the actual collection threw {0}: {1}.
trans-unit.target: enumerating the actual collection threw {0}: {1}.

trans-unit.source: reading the actual member threw {0}: {1}.
trans-unit.target: reading the actual member threw {0}: {1}.

trans-unit.source: Mismatch at '{0}': {1}
trans-unit.target: Mismatch at '{0}': {1}
trans-unit.note: {0} is a member path (e.g., 'Order.Items[2].Price'), {1} is a localized reason describing the kind of mismatch.

trans-unit.source: reading the expected dictionary threw {0}: {1}.
trans-unit.target: reading the expected dictionary threw {0}: {1}.

trans-unit.source: enumerating the expected collection threw {0}: {1}.
trans-unit.target: enumerating the expected collection threw {0}: {1}.

trans-unit.source: reading the expected member threw {0}: {1}.
trans-unit.target: reading the expected member threw {0}: {1}.

trans-unit.source: actual has unexpected members not present on expected: {0}.
trans-unit.target: actual has unexpected members not present on expected: {0}.

trans-unit.source: IEquatable.Equals threw {0}: {1}.
trans-unit.target: IEquatable.Equals threw {0}: {1}.

trans-unit.source: collections differ in length (expected {0} elements, actual {1}).
trans-unit.target: collections differ in length (expected {0} elements, actual {1}).

trans-unit.source: comparison exceeded the maximum supported depth of {0}.
trans-unit.target: comparison exceeded the maximum supported depth of {0}.

trans-unit.source: key {0} present on expected is missing from actual.
trans-unit.target: key {0} present on expected is missing from actual.

trans-unit.source: member '{0}' present on expected is missing from actual.
trans-unit.target: member '{0}' present on expected is missing from actual.

trans-unit.source: one side is null, the other is not.
trans-unit.target: one side is null, the other is not.

trans-unit.source: graph topology differs (the same reference on one side appears paired with different references on the other side).
trans-unit.target: graph topology differs (the same reference on one side appears paired with different references on the other side).

trans-unit.source: incompatible types (expected '{0}', actual '{1}').
trans-unit.target: incompatible types (expected '{0}', actual '{1}').

trans-unit.source: key {0} present on actual is not on expected.
trans-unit.target: key {0} present on actual is not on expected.

trans-unit.source: values are not equal.
trans-unit.target: values are not equal.

trans-unit.source: <root>
trans-unit.target: <root>
trans-unit.note: Placeholder used in equivalence-mismatch messages when the difference is at the top of the object graph.

trans-unit.source: Expected any value except:<{1}>. Actual:<{2}>. {0}
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba cualquier valor excepto <{1}>, pero es <{2}>. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected a difference greater than <{3}> between expected value <{1}> and actual value <{2}>. {0}
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba una diferencia mayor que <{3}> entre el valor esperado <{1}> y el valor actual <{2}>. {0}

trans-unit.source: Could not complete structural comparison.
trans-unit.target: Could not complete structural comparison.

trans-unit.source: Could not complete structural comparison (strict mode).
trans-unit.target: Could not complete structural comparison (strict mode).

trans-unit.source: Expected values to be structurally different.
trans-unit.target: Expected values to be structurally different.

trans-unit.source: Expected values to be structurally different (strict mode).
trans-unit.target: Expected values to be structurally different (strict mode).

trans-unit.source: Both values are <null>. {0}
trans-unit.target: Ambos valores son <null>. {0}

trans-unit.source: Actual is <null>. {0}
trans-unit.target: El valor real es <null>. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected is <null>. {0}
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba <null>. {0}

trans-unit.source: Do not pass value types to AreSame(). Values converted to Object will never be the same. Consider using AreEqual(). {0}
trans-unit.target: No pase tipos de valor a AreSame(). Los valores convertidos a Object no serán nunca iguales. Considere el uso de AreEqual(). {0}

trans-unit.source: {0} assertion(s) failed within the assert scope.
trans-unit.target: {0} Error en las aserciones dentro del ámbito de aserción.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the number of assertion failures collected in the scope.

trans-unit.source: Nested assert scopes are not allowed. Dispose the current scope before creating a new one.
trans-unit.target: No se permiten ámbitos de aserción anidados. Elimine el ámbito actual antes de crear uno nuevo.

trans-unit.source: Details:
trans-unit.target: Detalles:

trans-unit.source: Message: {0}
trans-unit.target: Mensaje: {0}

trans-unit.source: Both collections are empty. {0}
trans-unit.target: Ambas colecciones están vacías. {0}

trans-unit.source: Both collection contain same elements.
trans-unit.target: Ambas colecciones tienen los mismos elementos.

trans-unit.source: Both collection references point to the same collection object. {0}
trans-unit.target: Las referencias de ambas colecciones apuntan al mismo objeto de colección. {0}

trans-unit.source: Both collections contain the same elements. {0}
trans-unit.target: Ambas colecciones tienen los mismos elementos. {0}

trans-unit.source: '{0}' expression: '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Expresión "{0}": "{1}".
trans-unit.note: Example: "'value' expression: 'new object()'", where 'value' is the parameter name of an assertion method, and 'new object()' is the expression the user passed to the assert method.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' expression: '{1}', '{2}' expression: '{3}', '{4}' expression: '{5}'.
trans-unit.target: Expresión "{0}": "{1}", expresión "{2}": "{3}", expresión "{4}": "{5}".
trans-unit.note: Example: "'substring' expression: 'userCode1', 'value' expression: 'userCode2'", where 'substring' and 'value' are the parameter names of an assertion method, and 'userCode's are the expressions the user passed to the assert method.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' expression: '{1}', '{2}' expression: '{3}'.
trans-unit.target: Expresión "{0}": "{1}", expresión "{2}": "{3}".
trans-unit.note: Example: "'minValue' expression: 'userCode1', 'maxValue' expression: 'userCode2', 'value' expression: 'userCode3'", where 'minValue', 'maxValue', and 'value' are the parameter names of an assertion method, and 'userCode's are the expressions the user passed to the assert method.

trans-unit.source: String '{0}' does not contain string '{1}'. {2}.
trans-unit.target: La cadena '{0}' no contiene la cadena '{1}'. {2}.

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to contain the specified item. {0}
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba que la colección contuviera el elemento especificado. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to contain the specified element.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to contain the specified element.

trans-unit.source: Expected at least one item to match the predicate. {0}
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba al menos un elemento para que coincida con el predicado. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to contain an element matching the predicate.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to contain an element matching the predicate.

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to contain exactly one element but found {1} element(s). {0}
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba que la colección contuviera exactamente un elemento, pero se encontraron {1} elementos. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to contain exactly one element.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to contain exactly one element.

trans-unit.source: Expected exactly one item to match the predicate but found {1} item(s). {0}
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba exactamente un elemento para que coincida con el predicado, pero se encontraron {1} elementos. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to contain exactly one element matching the predicate.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to contain exactly one element matching the predicate.

trans-unit.source: Expected string to contain the specified substring.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to contain the specified substring.

trans-unit.source: String '{0}' does contain string '{1}'. {2}.
trans-unit.target: La cadena '{0}' contiene la cadena '{1}'. {2}.

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to not contain the specified item. {0}
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba que la colección no contenga el elemento especificado. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to not contain the specified element.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to not contain the specified element.

trans-unit.source: Expected no items to match the predicate. {0}
trans-unit.target: No se esperaba que ningún elemento coincidía con el predicado. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to not contain an element matching the predicate.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to not contain an element matching the predicate.

trans-unit.source: Expected string to not contain the specified substring.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to not contain the specified substring.

trans-unit.source: String '{0}' ends with string '{1}'. {2}
trans-unit.target: La cadena "{0}" termina con la cadena "{1}". {2}

trans-unit.source: Expected string to not end with the specified suffix.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to not end with the specified suffix.

trans-unit.source: Expected string to not match the specified regular expression.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to not match the specified regular expression.

trans-unit.source: String '{0}' starts with string '{1}'. {2}
trans-unit.target: La cadena "{0}" comienza con la cadena "{1}". {2}

trans-unit.source: Expected string to not start with the specified prefix.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to not start with the specified prefix.

trans-unit.source: Dynamic data field '{0}' should be static.
trans-unit.target: El campo de datos dinámico '{0}' debe ser estático.

trans-unit.source: Dynamic data method '{0}' should be static, non-generic, and cannot have 'params' parameter.
trans-unit.target: El método de datos dinámicos '{0}' debe ser estático, no genérico y no puede tener un parámetro 'params'.

trans-unit.source: Dynamic data property '{0}' should be static and have a getter.
trans-unit.target: La propiedad de datos dinámicos '{0}' debe ser estática y tener un captador.

trans-unit.source: The dynamic data source '{0}' in type '{1}' should exist and be a property, a method, or a field.
trans-unit.target: El origen de datos dinámico '{0}' del tipo '{1}' debe existir y ser una propiedad, un método o un campo.

trans-unit.source: The number of elements in the collections do not match. Expected:<{1}>. Actual:<{2}>.{0}
trans-unit.target: El número de elementos de las colecciones no coincide. Se esperaba:<{1}>, pero es:<{2}>.{0}

trans-unit.source: Element at index {1} is not of expected type. Expected type:<{2}>. Actual type:<{3}>.{0}
trans-unit.target: El elemento del índice {1} no es del tipo esperado. Tipo esperado:<{2}>, pero es el tipo:<{3}>.{0}

trans-unit.source: String '{0}' does not end with string '{1}'. {2}
trans-unit.target: La cadena "{0}" no termina con la cadena "{1}". {2}

trans-unit.source: {0} failed.
trans-unit.target: {0} erróneo.

trans-unit.source: Expected string to end with the specified suffix.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to end with the specified suffix.

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to contain a specific number of elements.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to contain a specific number of elements.

trans-unit.source: The property 'TestContext.{0}' is related to current test is not available during assembly or class fixtures.
trans-unit.target: La propiedad "TestContext.{0}" está relacionado con la prueba actual y no está disponible durante los accesorios de ensamblado o clase.

trans-unit.source: Invalid GitHub ticket URL
trans-unit.target: Dirección URL de vale de GitHub no válida

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to be empty.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to be empty.

trans-unit.source: Expected condition to be false.
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba que la condición fuera false.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be greater than the lower bound.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be greater than the lower bound.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be greater than or equal to the lower bound.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be greater than or equal to the lower bound.

trans-unit.source: Value '{0}' is not within the expected range [{1}..{2}]. {3}
trans-unit.target: El valor "{0}" no está dentro del rango esperado [{1}..{2}]. {3}

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be within the inclusive range.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be within the inclusive range.

trans-unit.source: The maximum value must be greater than or equal to the minimum value.
trans-unit.target: El valor máximo debe ser igual o mayor que el valor mínimo.

trans-unit.source: {0} Expected type:<{1}>. Actual type:<{2}>.
trans-unit.target: {0} Tipo esperado:<{1}>. Tipo real:<{2}>.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be less than the upper bound.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be less than the upper bound.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be less than or equal to the upper bound.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be less than or equal to the upper bound.

trans-unit.source: String '{0}' does not match pattern '{1}'. {2}
trans-unit.target: La cadena "{0}" no coincide con el patrón "{1}". {2}

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be negative.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be negative.

trans-unit.source: Expected collection to not be empty.
trans-unit.target: Expected collection to not be empty.

trans-unit.source: Wrong Type:<{1}>. Actual type:<{2}>. {0}
trans-unit.target: Tipo incorrecto:<{1}>. Tipo actual:<{2}>. {0}

trans-unit.source: {0} Expected exact type:<{1}>. Actual type:<{2}>.
trans-unit.target: {0} Tipo exacto esperado: <{1}>. Tipo real:<{2}>.

trans-unit.source: Wrong exact Type:<{1}>. Actual type:<{2}>. {0}
trans-unit.target: Tipo exacto incorrecto: <{1}>. Tipo actual:<{2}>. {0}

trans-unit.source: String '{0}' matches pattern '{1}'. {2}
trans-unit.target: La cadena "{0}" coincide con el patrón "{1}". {2}

trans-unit.source: Expected value to not be null.
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba que el valor no fuera null.

trans-unit.source: Expected values to not be equal.
trans-unit.target: Expected values to not be equal.

trans-unit.source: Expected strings to be equal.
trans-unit.target: Expected strings to be equal.

trans-unit.source: Expected values to be equal, but they are of different types.
trans-unit.target: Expected values to be equal, but they are of different types.

trans-unit.source: Expected values to be equal.
trans-unit.target: Expected values to be equal.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be null.
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba que el valor fuera null.

trans-unit.source: Expected value to be positive.
trans-unit.target: Expected value to be positive.

trans-unit.source: Expected condition to be true.
trans-unit.target: Se esperaba que la condición fuera true.

trans-unit.source: Expected string to match the specified regular expression.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to match the specified regular expression.

trans-unit.source: The member specified ({0}) could not be found. You might need to regenerate your private accessor, or the member may be private and defined on a base class. If the latter is true, you need to pass the type that defines the member into PrivateObject's constructor.
trans-unit.target: No se encontró el miembro especificado ({0}). Es posible que tenga que volver a generar el descriptor de acceso privado, o que el miembro sea privado y esté definido en una clase base. Si esto último es cierto, debe pasar el tipo que define el miembro al constructor de PrivateObject.

trans-unit.source: The constructor with the specified signature could not be found. You might need to regenerate your private accessor, or the member may be private and defined on a base class. If the latter is true, you need to pass the type that defines the member into PrivateObject's constructor.
trans-unit.target: No se encontró el constructor con la signatura especificada. Es posible que tenga que volver a generar el descriptor de acceso privado, o que el miembro sea privado y esté definido en una clase base. Si esto último es cierto, debe pasar el tipo que define el miembro al constructor de PrivateObject.

trans-unit.source: The parameter '{0}' is invalid. The value cannot be null.
trans-unit.target: El parámetro '{0}' no es válido. El valor no puede ser null.

trans-unit.source: Different number of elements.
trans-unit.target: Número diferente de elementos.

trans-unit.source: Element(s) <{0}> is/are not present in the collection.
trans-unit.target: Los elementos <{0}> no están presentes en la colección.

trans-unit.source: [STATestMethod] is not supported on non-Windows platforms. STA (Single Threaded Apartment) is a Windows-only COM threading concept. Use [OSCondition(OperatingSystems.Windows)] to skip this test on non-Windows platforms.
trans-unit.target: [STATestMethod] no se admite en plataformas que no son de Windows. STA (Single Threaded Apartment) es un concepto de subprocesamiento COM solo para Windows. Use [OSCondition(OperatingSystems.Windows)] para omitir esta prueba en plataformas que no son de Windows.

trans-unit.source: String '{0}' does not start with string '{1}'. {2}
trans-unit.target: La cadena "{0}" no empieza con la cadena "{1}". {2}

trans-unit.source: The property {0} has type {1}; expected type {2}.
trans-unit.target: La propiedad {0} tiene el tipo {1}; se esperaba el tipo {2}.

trans-unit.source: (null)
trans-unit.target: (null)

trans-unit.source: (object)
trans-unit.target: (objeto)

trans-unit.source: Expected string to start with the specified prefix.
trans-unit.target: Expected string to start with the specified prefix.

trans-unit.source: (Failed to get the message for an exception of type {0} due to an exception.)
trans-unit.target: (No se pudo obtener el mensaje para una excepción del tipo {0} debido a una excepción.)

trans-unit.source: Expected exception type:<{1}> but no exception was thrown. {0}
trans-unit.target: Tipo de excepción esperada:<{1}> pero no se lanzó ninguna excepción. {0}

trans-unit.source: Expected exception type:<{1}>. Actual exception type:<{2}>. {0}
trans-unit.target: Tipo de excepción esperada:<{1}>. Tipo de excepción actual: <{2}>. {0}

trans-unit.source: Property or method {0} on {1} return type is not assignable to 'IEnumerable'.
trans-unit.target: La propiedad o el método {0} en el tipo de retorno {1} no se puede asignar a "IEnumerable".

trans-unit.source: Value returned by property or method {0} shouldn't be null.
trans-unit.target: El valor devuelto por la propiedad o el método {0} no debe ser nulo.

trans-unit.source: Method {0} must match the expected signature: public static {1} {0}({2}).
trans-unit.target: El método {0} debe coincidir con la signatura esperada: {1} {0}({2}) estática pública.

trans-unit.source: Property or method {0} on {1} returns empty IEnumerable<object[]>.
trans-unit.target: La propiedad o el método {0} en {1} devuelve un elemento IEnumerable<object[]> vacío.

trans-unit.source: Assert.Equals should not be used for Assertions. Please use Assert.AreEqual & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: No se debe usar Assert.Equals para aserciones. Use Assert.AreEqual y Overloads en su lugar.

trans-unit.source: Assert.ReferenceEquals should not be used for Assertions. Please use Assert.AreSame & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: Assert.ReferenceEquals no se debe usar para las aserciones. Use Assert.AreSame & sobrecargas en su lugar.

trans-unit.source: StringAssert.Equals should not be used for Assertions. Please use StringAssert methods or Assert.AreEqual & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: StringAssert.Equals no se debe usar para las aserciones. Use los métodos StringAssert o las sobrecargas Assert.AreEqual & en su lugar.

trans-unit.source: StringAssert.ReferenceEquals should not be used for Assertions. Please use StringAssert methods or Assert.AreSame & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: StringAssert.ReferenceEquals no se debe usar para las aserciones. Use los métodos StringAssert o las sobrecargas Assert.AreSame & en su lugar.

trans-unit.source: CollectionAssert.Equals should not be used for Assertions. Please use CollectionAssert.AreEqual & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: CollectionAssert.Equals no se debe usar para las aserciones. Use CollectionAssert.AreEqual y sobrecargas en su lugar.

trans-unit.source: CollectionAssert.ReferenceEquals should not be used for Assertions. Please use CollectionAssert methods or Assert.AreSame & overloads instead.
trans-unit.target: CollectionAssert.ReferenceEquals no se debe usar para las aserciones. Use los métodos CollectionAssert o las sobrecargas Assert.AreSame & en su lugar.
